{"code":"(def triggered-high
  (pagerduty__list_incidents {:status "triggered" :urgency "high"}))

(if (empty? triggered-high)
  (do
    (slack__post_message {:channel "incidents" :text "All clear."})
    {:action :slack-posted :count 0})
  (let [ids (map :id triggered-high)
        body (str "Incidents requiring triage:\n" (join "\n" ids))]
